title: School strikes in six areas may be avoided after deal reached

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Strike action could have impacted schools in Glasgow, East Renfrewshire, Dundee, Fife, Perth and Kinross and Moray.

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: School strikes in six areas may be avoided as progress towards deal EIS members held a two-day strike across Scotland in February 2023

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: Strikes at schools in six council areas across Scotland over teacher workloads could be avoided after progress in talks between a union and the Scottish government. The Educational Institute of Scotland (EIS) said a draft agreement to end the dispute had been reached, however it also needs to be acceptable to local council body Cosla.

sourceReferences.citationText: bbc-scotland – School strikes in six areas may be avoided after deal reached
